message: Short JSONL record for baseline highlighting.
This JSONL message is intentionally long enough to demonstrate soft wrapping inside the viewer without requiring horizontal scrolling by default.
One physical JSONL record with a deeply nested JSON payload; fmtview should expand this record by JSON structure.
The embedded XML payload has a local closing-tag mismatch for visual inspection.

Special token preview: line one
line two	with tab, quoted "value", and escaped backslash \.
Use Space/f and b to page through JSONL streams.
